text:
DE

Tesla CEO unfollows the Olympics on X, citing displeasure with the Last Supper drag act at the opening ceremony.

Elon Musk has unfollowed the official Olympics account on X, formerly Twitter, after the Paris Olympics opening ceremony, which included a performance many perceived as mocking Christianity.

The Olympics laser show was amazing!pic.twitter.com/CpN1GMMVnU

Musk, who was in Paris during the ceremony, praised the laser show but later expressed displeasure with the controversial drag parody of the Last Supper.

🚫@elonmuskis no longer following@olympicspic.twitter.com/p8XRT4Mogd

In a recent interview with Jordan Peterson, Musk, a self-described "cultural Christian," discussed his views on religion and revealed that his son was misled into consenting to puberty blockers, attributing this to the "woke mind virus" and transgender ideology.

Absolutely not. A disgusting display of mockery of one of the most Holy and Sacred images of our Christian faith, by the least tolerant demographic in the world, the Radical Rainbow Mafia! SHAMEFUL!pic.twitter.com/HG70suLot2

The ceremony’s performance, featuring drag queens in a scene reminiscent of Leonardo da Vinci’s Last Supper, drew harsh criticism, particularly from Christians, for its perceived insensitivity to a sacred Christian symbol. This broader artistic display, which also included a drag performance with children, sparked significant backlash online.

title: Elon Musk unfollows Olympics after controversial Last Supper parody
author: Pop Culture & Art
description: Tesla CEO unfollows the Olympics on X, citing displeasure with the Last Supper drag act at the opening ceremony.
keywords: Paris Olympics, opening ceremony, drag queens, Last Supper, parody, controversy, Christian, christianity, jesus christ, backlash, LGBTQ, performance, Olympic Games, diversity, inclusion, religious sensitivity, public reaction, blasphemy, demonic, disgusting, offensive, matt walsh, Leonardo da Vinci, painting, sacred, symbol, elon musk, jordan peterson, children, grooming, act, outrage, transgender, trans, ideology, woke
